name: Cloud Push
description: Atmospheric mass set in motion by force

prompts.label: atmospheric cloud mass set in gentle purposeful motion
prompts.text: atmospheric cloud mass set in gentle purposeful motion, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: weather system nudged forward by invisible hand
prompts.text: weather system nudged forward by invisible hand, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: fog bank advancing with slow deliberate momentum
prompts.text: fog bank advancing with slow deliberate momentum, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: sky texture shifting as pressure gradient takes hold
prompts.text: sky texture shifting as pressure gradient takes hold, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: cumulus formation drifting with building wind energy
prompts.text: cumulus formation drifting with building wind energy, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
